title: Record results from TSMC increase uncertainty and hit global tech sector
summary: The Taiwanese firm beats expectations but its spending plans cause declines in Asian and US stock markets.

title: The Strait of Hormuz crisis sends oil prices soaring and threatens global supply
summary: Tensions from Iranian threats and the US blockade raise crude oil and prompt scarcity warnings.

title: SpaceX plummets on stock market and falls below its IPO price
summary: Shares of Musk's company lose more than one trillion dollars in value after a massive sell-off.

title: Bitcoin and ethereum rise amid mixed signals in crypto market
summary: Cryptocurrencies record modest gains as the market seeks direction without macro catalysts.

title: European markets close lower, Wall Street trades mixed
summary: The Ibex 35 falls 0.77% and the DAX struggles around 25,000 points, while the Dow Jones rises and the Nasdaq falls.

title: Abbott beats expectations in second quarter and raises earnings forecast
summary: The medical device company reports solid results driven by demand for diagnostics.

title: Investors rotate into small-cap stocks as an alternative to big tech
summary: Growing interest in small caps reflects the search for better returns outside Big Tech.

title: Uber buys Delivery Hero (Glovo) for $14.8 billion
summary: The acquisition strengthens Uber's position in the global food delivery market.

title: Seven & i invests in Polish convenience store chain Zabka
summary: The Japanese retail giant acquires a majority stake in Poland's largest convenience store chain.

title: Energy company listings surge due to artificial intelligence boom
summary: Investors flock to IPOs in the electric sector to capitalize on growing demand from data centers.

title: Digi debuts on stock market with 7% rise and strong institutional interest
summary: The telecom operator starts trading at 5.60 euros and attracts funds like Amundi and Wellington.

title: US retail sales moderate to 0.2% in June, in line with expectations
summary: The data shows a slowdown in consumption compared to previous months, but without negative surprises.

title: Federal Reserve highlights slight economic improvement and moderation of inflation in its Beige Book
summary: The Fed's report notes a rebound in activity and a decrease in prices in several regions.

title: New York freezes permits for new AI data centers due to impact on electricity costs
summary: The measure aims to curb energy consumption but raises doubts about the expansion of AI infrastructure.

title: EU demands Google modify its platform to facilitate use of rival AI assistants
summary: Brussels requests design changes so that users can freely choose between competing AI services.

title: Massive data leak at India's largest nuclear plant due to cyberattack
summary: 19,000 classified documents were exposed, posing serious security risks for the facility.

title: PwC and a partner fined more than 3 million pounds for audit failures at Babcock
summary: The UK accounting regulator imposes sanctions for deficiencies in the audit of the defense contractor.

title: British Parliament rejects former Virgin Money executive to lead accounting regulator
summary: Lawmakers do not support the candidacy, forcing the search for a new nominee for chairman.

title: Thames Water warns about its financial viability as government studies intervention
summary: The water company faces debt problems and the mayor of Greater Manchester proposes its nationalization.

title: Downing Street convenes private equity executives to address London Stock Exchange crisis
summary: The government seeks to stem the exodus of companies from the London Stock Exchange through dialogue with investment funds.
